strategy:
I had to memorize certain mushrooms by a general concept, such as 'x color mushroom is often good in any variety for this color, or that this x color mushroom is too skinny or flat and must be avoided'. 

Mostly the caps color was to be examined and memorized, however the stem color was only memorized if it was visually extreme, such as extremely large stem, or extremely skinny stem. 

Certain colors such as blue might have been avoided altogether unless it was irregular (too skinny, too flat) looking. Certain colors such as green or cyan was generally favored since the rng in what was given to me (most normal looking mushrooms, normal cap and normal stem) was generally given a positive bonus rather than a negative one and was chosen more often. 

Certain mushrooms however such as magenta or black was not seem too often, so it was guesswork based on a few mushrooms that I did see.
